Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a client project for system deployment, containing overall project details and branding.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns or created this project. (Relationship: User 1:N Project)

clientName.description: The name of the client company (e.g., 'Bombril', 'BIC').

clientLogo.description: URL to the client's logo image.

clientColor.description: Primary brand color of the client, used for dynamic theming (e.g., '#FF0000').

clientColorSecondary.description: Secondary brand color of the client, used for dynamic theming.

mascotImageUrl.description: URL to an image of the Sellers Pulse mascot customized with the client's branding.

startDate.description: The official start date of the project.

endDate.description: The official estimated end date of the project.

currentPhaseId.description: Reference to the currently active Phase for this project. (Relationship: Project 1:1 Phase)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

Phase.title: Phase
Phase.description: Represents a specific stage or milestone within a project, part of a standard project workflow.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Phase entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this phase belongs to. (Relationship: Project 1:N Phase)

name.description: The descriptive name of the phase (e.g., 'Reunião de Boas-Vindas').

order.description: The sequential order of the phase within the project workflow.

startDate.description: The scheduled start date for this phase.

endDate.description: The scheduled end date for this phase.

status.description: The current status of the phase.

color.description: A color associated with the phase, potentially inherited from the client's brand color.

WeeklyUpdate.title: WeeklyUpdate
WeeklyUpdate.description: Captures weekly progress and key metrics for a project, used for reporting and presentations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WeeklyUpdate entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this weekly update belongs to. (Relationship: Project 1:N WeeklyUpdate)

weekNumber.description: The sequential week number within the project's lifecycle for this update.

date.description: The date corresponding to this weekly update.

distributorsTotal.description: Total number of distributors associated with the project.

distributorsPending.description: Number of distributors whose integration is pending.

distributorsBlocked.description: Number of distributors whose integration is blocked.

highlights.description: A list of key achievements or positive developments for the week.

blockers.description: A list of obstacles or issues encountered during the week.

nextSteps.description: A list of planned actions for the upcoming period.

aiSummary.description: An AI-generated summary of the weekly update content.

definition.description: Top-level collection for client projects. Each project is owned by a specific user identified by the 'userId' field.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for a client project.
